title: gladiolus nivenii
intro: Gladiolus nivenii, also known as the Niven's gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus nivenii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Gladiolus nivenii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety as a treatment have not been extensively scientifically proven.
